data.description:
I need to download only audio from youtube video. For this I use the yt-dlp tool.
In the console, I enter the following command, which downloads the audio as a .webm. I change the extension to .mp3...

https://stackoverflow.com/feeds/question.title: Feed for question 'How to extract only audio from downloading video? Python yt-dlp'

#onetrust-banner-sdk {
  background: var(--blue-100, #f0f4ff) !important;
  width: 410px !important;
  max-width: calc(100% - 32px) !important;
  padding: 24px !important;
  border-radius: 0px !important;
  left: 16px !important;
  right: 16px !important;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk * {
  color: var(--black-600, #211d1e) !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-container {
    position: initial !important;
}

/* Header - not used */
#onetrust-banner-sdk .banner-header {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Shadow */
#onetrust-banner-sdk.otFloatingRoundedCorner {
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 4px 13px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.13),
    0 3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.09),
    0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.09) !important;
}

/* Typography */
#onetrust-banner-sdk * {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto,
    "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji",
    "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji" !important;
}

/* Policy */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy,
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-wo-title #onetrust-group-container {
  margin-top: 0px !important;
}

/* Links */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] {
    color: var(--black-500, #3B4045);
    text-decoration: underline;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href]:hover {
    color: var(--blue-500, #5076f2);
    text-decoration: underline;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-title {
  padding: 0 0 4px 0 !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text {
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 8px !important;
  line-height: 1.30769231 !important;
}

/* Buttons */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group-parent {
  padding: 0 !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: start !important;
  gap: 4px;
  margin: 8px 0 0 0;
}


#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button {
  flex: 0 1 auto;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  font-weight: bold !important;
  border-radius: 1000px !important;
  padding: 6px 12px !important;
  letter-spacing: normal !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border: 1px solid transparent !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  line-height: 1.15 !important;
  width: auto !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button#onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,.08) !important;
  color: var(--black-600, #201C1D) !important;
  border-color: transparent !important;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button#onetrust-pc-btn-handler:hover {
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,.15) !important;
}


#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler {
 background-color: var(--black-600, #201c1d) !important;
  color: var(--white, #ffffff) !important;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button#onetrust-reject-all-handler {
  background-color: var(--black-600, #201c1d) !important;
  color: var(--white, #FFFFFF) !important;
}

/* Close button */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
  top: 0px !important;
  right: 0px  !important;
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  #onetrust-banner-sdk {
    padding: 16px !important;
    bottom: 16px !important;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy {
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    background-image: none !important;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group .banner-actions-container button {
    margin: 8px 0 0 0 !important;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
    display: block !important;
  }
  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button {
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-top: 8px !important;
  }

<div class="postcell post-layout--right">

    
    <div class="s-prose js-post-body" itemprop="text">
                
<p>I need to download only audio from youtube video. For this I use the yt-dlp tool.</p>
<p>In the console, I enter the following command, which downloads the audio as a .webm. I change the extension to .mp3 and everything works fine, it's a regular .mp3 file.</p>
<p>Command: <code>yt-dlp --extract-audio https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cJuO985zF8E</code></p>
<p>In the python script I'm using this code:</p>
<pre><code>import yt_dlp
import os

def download_audio(link):
    with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL({'extract_audio': True}) as video:
        info_dict = video.extract_info(link, download = True)
        video_title = info_dict['title']
        print(video_title)
        #video.download(link)

download_audio('https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cJuO985zF8E')
</code></pre>
<p>But the script does not load the video as an audio file, but as a video. How to solve this problem?</p>
<p>(sorry for my English)</p>
<p>I tried many methods but nothing worked.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="s-prose js-post-body" itemprop="text">
<p>I've modified and tested your code in Google Collab and it sets the name of the file with the .mp3 extension.</p>
<p>Sources:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://stackoverflow.com/a/72009150/12511801">How to rename downloaded audio files extensions to mp3 with python</a></li>
<li><a href="https://stackoverflow.com/a/41240945/12511801">Change the output name when download with youtube-dl using python</a></li>
</ul>
<p>Modified code:</p>
<pre><code>def download_audio(link):
  with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL({'extract_audio': True, 'format': 'bestaudio', 'outtmpl': '%(title)s.mp3'}) as video:
    info_dict = video.extract_info(link, download = True)
    video_title = info_dict['title']
    print(video_title)
    video.download(link)    
    print("Successfully Downloaded - see local folder on Google Colab")

download_audio('https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cJuO985zF8E')
</code></pre>
<p>Result: a .mp3 file with the name of the YouTube video.</p>
<pre><code>KORDHELL - MEMPHIS DOOM.mp3
</code></pre>

    <div class="s-prose js-post-body" itemprop="text">
<p><code>"extract_audio"</code> is not a key recognised by <code>YoutubeDL</code> and thus does nothing. You have to use <code>"format": "bestaudio"</code> instead:</p>
<pre><code># […]
with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL({"format": "bestaudio"}) as video:
# […]
</code></pre>
    </div>

metadata.twitter:description:
I need to download only audio from youtube video. For this I use the yt-dlp tool.
In the console, I enter the following command, which downloads the audio as a .webm. I change the extension to .mp3...
metadata.twitter:title: How to extract only audio from downloading video? Python yt-dlp

data.title: How to extract only audio from downloading video? Python yt-dlp
